name: alloydb-omni
description: Create, connect, and interact with an AlloyDB Omni database and data.

settings.name: Host
settings.description: (Optional) Host of the AlloyDB Omni instance. localhost by default

settings.name: Port
settings.description: (Optional) Port of the AlloyDB Omni instance. 5432 by default

settings.name: Database
settings.description: Name of the database to be connected to
